picks.quote: Stylistically, I like Holloway in this fight. So, I think I'm going to pick Holloway.
For me, I'm picking Bojan. I think he's going to be able to keep his striking, keep it at distance, and I think he's going to be able to decision his way to win.
For my pick, I think I'm going to go with Rosas. I think he's going to be able to pull it off.
